description: A team's travel manager needs to book a charter flight for an upcoming away game.

nodes.task_description: Identify the travel dates, destination, and number of passengers (players and staff).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent has all the required details for the flight.

nodes.task_description: Request quotes from several approved charter flight operators.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent receives quotes from three different operators.

nodes.task_description: Select the best option and book the charter flight.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully books the flight and receives a confirmation.

nodes.task_description: Distribute the flight itinerary to all traveling personnel.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends the final itinerary to all players and staff.
